parameters.jsCode:
// Compute1 outputs { message, saveRow } — read from saveRow
const row = $json.saveRow || {};
const p = v => { const n = parseFloat(v); return isNaN(n) ? null : n; };
const i = v => { const n = parseInt(v);   return isNaN(n) ? null : n; };
return [{ json: {
  date:           row.Date,
  timestamp:      row.Timestamp || new Date().toISOString(),
  type:           row.Type || 'PRE-MARKET',
  risk_verdict:   row.RiskVerdict  || null,
  risk_score:     i(row.RiskScore),
  risk_factors:   row.RiskFactors  || null,
  focus_sectors:  row.FocusSectors || null,
  top_3_sectors:  row.Top3Sectors  || null,
  bot_3_sectors:  row.Bot3Sectors  || null,
  rotation_bias:  row.RotationBias || null,
  rotation_score: i(row.RotationScore),
  sector_ranking: row.SectorRanking || null,
  vix:            p(row.VIX),
  regime:         row.Regime       || null,
  leadership:     row.Leadership   || null,
  breadth_signal: row.BreadthSignal || null,
  credit_signal:  row.CreditSignal  || null,
  breadth:        row.Breadth       || null,
  liquidity:      row.Liquidity     || null,
  es_price:       p(row.ES_Price),
  es_change:      p(row.ES_Change),
  nq_change:      p(row.NQ_Change),
  spy_price:      p(row.SPY_Price),
  spy_change:     p(row.SPY_Change),
  qqq_change:     p(row.QQQ_Change),
  iwm_change:     p(row.IWM_Change),
  gold_change:    p(row.Gold_Change),
  oil_change:     p(row.Oil_Change),
  btc_change:     p(row.BTC_Change),
  eth_change:     p(row.ETH_Change),
  yield_10y:      p(row.Yield10Y),
  dxy_change:     p(row.DXY_Change),
  smh_change:     p(row.SMH_Change),
  iyt_change:     p(row.IYT_Change),
  xlk_change:     p(row.XLK_Change),
  xly_change:     p(row.XLY_Change),
  xlf_change:     p(row.XLF_Change),
  xli_change:     p(row.XLI_Change),
  xlb_change:     p(row.XLB_Change),
  xle_change:     p(row.XLE_Change),
  xlv_change:     p(row.XLV_Change),
  xlu_change:     p(row.XLU_Change),
  xlre_change:    p(row.XLRE_Change),
  xlp_change:     p(row.XLP_Change),
  xlc_change:     p(row.XLC_Change),
} }];

parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

parameters.jsCode:
const tickers = [
  // Futures     pre-market pulse
  { symbol: "ES=F",      label: "S&P 500 Futures",       category: "Futures" },
  { symbol: "NQ=F",      label: "Nasdaq Futures",         category: "Futures" },
  { symbol: "YM=F",      label: "Dow Futures",            category: "Futures" },
  { symbol: "RTY=F",     label: "Russell Futures",        category: "Futures" },

  // Indexes
  { symbol: "SPY",       label: "S&P 500 ETF",            category: "Equity Index" },
  { symbol: "QQQ",       label: "Nasdaq 100 ETF",         category: "Equity Index" },
  { symbol: "IWM",       label: "Russell 2000 ETF",       category: "Equity Index" },
  { symbol: "DIA",       label: "Dow Jones ETF",          category: "Equity Index" },
  { symbol: "RSP",       label: "S&P Equal Weight",       category: "Equity Index" },
  { symbol: "SMH",       label: "Semiconductors",          category: "Leadership" },
  { symbol: "IYT",       label: "Transportation",          category: "Leadership" },

  // Volatility
  { symbol: "^VIX",      label: "VIX",                   category: "Volatility" },

  // Rates
  { symbol: "^TNX",      label: "10Y Treasury Yield",     category: "Rates" },
  { symbol: "TLT",       label: "20Y Bond ETF",           category: "Rates" },
  { symbol: "HYG",       label: "High Yield Credit",      category: "Rates" },

  // Dollar
  { symbol: "DX-Y.NYB",  label: "US Dollar Index",        category: "Macro" },

  // Sectors
  { symbol: "XLK",       label: "Technology",             category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLY",       label: "Consumer Discretionary", category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLF",       label: "Financials",             category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLI",       label: "Industrials",            category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLB",       label: "Materials",              category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLE",       label: "Energy",                 category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLV",       label: "Healthcare",             category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLU",       label: "Utilities",              category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLRE",      label: "Real Estate",            category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLP",       label: "Consumer Staples",       category: "Sector" },
  { symbol: "XLC",       label: "Communication Svcs",     category: "Sector" },

  // Crypto
  { symbol: "BTC-USD",   label: "Bitcoin",                category: "Crypto" },
  { symbol: "ETH-USD",   label: "Ethereum",               category: "Crypto" },

  // Commodities
  { symbol: "GC=F",      label: "Gold Futures",           category: "Commodity" },
  { symbol: "CL=F",      label: "Crude Oil Futures",      category: "Commodity" },
];

// Return single bulk symbol string for Yahoo Finance API
const symbols = tickers.map(t => t.symbol).join(',');
return [{ json: { symbols, tickers } }];

parameters.text:
=You are a terse market analyst. Write exactly 3 plain-text sentences — no JSON, no markdown, no bullets, no field names.
Sentence 1: state the dominant theme using the risk verdict shown (e.g. RISK-OFF, LEANING RISK-OFF) and the ES and NQ % changes from the Futures table.
Sentence 2: name the specific trade setup using the rotation direction shown after "Rotation:" and the sectors listed after "Focus:" in the brief. If Focus is empty, use the top sector from the Sector Rotation table.
Sentence 3: name one specific risk using an actual number from the data — a VIX value, a sector %, or an asset % — that is different from what was stated in sentence 1.
Max 400 chars total. Never say field names like RiskVerdict or FocusSectors. Never invent data.

{{ $json.message }}

nodes.name: Insert or update rows in a table
